description: CompositionKhakhi outdoor shorts made of 100% nylon, has an elasticated waistband on the back, looped waistband on the front with button and zipper closure, insert mesh pockets on the sides  with a zippered chamber inside the right pocket, insert mesh pockets on the back and brand name printed on the left legFittingRegularWash careWash in water below 40 degreesWash dark colours separatelyDo not soak, tumble dry, bleach or dry cleanDry in shadeWarm ironDo not iron on prints/trims/logoLook cool while exploring a trail in these rugged khakhi outdoor shorts from adidas. The printed logo on the right leg increases the brand appeal. The fabric keeps you feeling fresh and comfortable all day long and easily weathers the outdoor elements. Team it with tees and trekking shoes for outdoor activities. Model statisticsThe model wears shorts of length 22"Height-6';  Waist-32"
